description: Install dependencies and verify baseline build compiles successfully before making changes.
steps: Run `npm install` in /projects/sandbox/cost-smart to install all dependencies
Run `npm run build` to verify the project compiles without errors in its current state
acceptance_criteria: `npm run build` completes with exit code 0
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm it passes
findings: npm install updated package-lock.json with additional resolved deps (@paypal/react-paypal-js, @vercel/kv). Build produces many recharts chart dimension warnings (pre-existing, non-fatal). Build exit code 0 confirmed.
